description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a classic double-cutaway design, featuring a sunburst finish that transitions from a dark outer edge to a lighter amber center. The front displays a white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, and a set of control knobs for volume and tone, along with a five-way selector switch. The neck is made of light-colored wood, likely maple, with dot inlays on a rosewood or maple fretboard and 21 frets. The headstock is angled and fitted with six inline tuning pegs, and the back of the guitar shows a rectangular neck plate and a rear cavity cover. The body is contoured for comfort, and the hardware is chrome-plated, including the bridge and tuning machines. This instrument is typical of those used in urban music scenes, suitable for street performances, garage bands, or music venues.
description: A sunburst-finished, double-cutaway electric guitar with a white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, and a maple neck with six inline tuners. Chrome hardware and a contoured body complete its classic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sunburst finish, white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, control knobs, and the full fretboard.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the guitar's slim body depth and the protruding pickguard and hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sunburst back, neck plate, and rear cavity cover, with the neck and headstock visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the thin body and the edge of the pickguard and hardware.
attribute_headstock_design: Classic Fender-style headstock with six inline tuning pegs and a rounded contour
